name: Jared Alexander Masters
tagline: Original scores and music production for film, brands, and artists.
subhead: Award-recognized original music for documentaries, commercials, and recording artists. From first idea to final mix.
metaDescription: Jared Alexander Masters is a film and commercial composer, producer, songwriter, and mixer. Original scores and music production for brands like The North Face and Patagonia, and artists including 311. Banff and Mountainfilm 2023 official selections.
awards: 2023 Banff Mountain Film Festival — Official Selection
